metrics.name: Cross-session resume via workspace/state.json
metrics.evidence: Multiple natural session boundaries crossed during Phase 1 dogfood run (2026-04-09 to 2026-04-11). Each new session correctly identified the current phase without operator verbal priming. This session (2026-04-11) is itself a clean resume: state.json read first, definition-of-done reported, pendingActions surfaced before operator confirmation. Target: clean resume within 2 natural session boundaries — met.

metrics.name: /checkpoint mid-phase write
metrics.evidence: /checkpoint invoked multiple times across Phase 1 dogfood run. All three sub-conditions observed met: (1) sessions completed within 60s; (2) required fields present — automated tests confirm; (3) subsequent sessions resumed correctly without verbal priming. Target: all three sub-conditions pass within 2 invocations — met.

metrics.name: Update channel latency
metrics.evidence: P1.1 DoD — pull model operational; change present without squad merge step; < 1 session open elapsed

metrics.name: CI-triggered assurance gate
metrics.evidence: Target met. 16 real CI traces in workspace/traces/ from PRs #31–#86 (Phase 2 inner loop); all show inProgress→completed pattern with trigger:ci. Gate fired automatically on PR open without manual action. Four sub-conditions confirmed: (1) trigger event = ci; (2) inProgress→completed transition present; (3) traceHash visible on PR; (4) no human initiation. Acceptance test passed at first Phase 2 inner loop PR (PR #31, 2026-04-11).

metrics.name: Watermark gate blocks regression
metrics.evidence: Target met. P1.4 DoD — 32 automated tests passing including block-on-drop and PR-surface sub-conditions. Gate has protected master across all Phase 2 and Phase 3 merges (PRs #31–#115) with zero regressions passing the watermark check. Both sub-conditions confirmed: (1) gate rejects degraded runs automatically; (2) rejection visible in PR via CI log.

metrics.name: Standards injection in trace — verifiable governance
metrics.evidence: Target met for minimum validation signal. All Phase 2 inner loop PRs (#31–#60s) passed the assurance gate — standards files and index.yml confirmed present at each PR's commit SHA. Injection mechanism operational. Full T3M1 8/8 audit question evidence (standardsInjected hash fields) depends on p3.2a trace fields which merged in PR #86 — those acceptance records pending in Phase 3 T3M1 metric.

metrics.name: Trace readability for risk review
metrics.evidence: Partial. Real CI traces now exist (workspace/traces/ — 16 JSONL files from Phase 2/3). Audit questions Q1–Q4 (instruction set, standards, model, validation) are answerable from trace format. Q5 (watermarkResult), Q6 (stalenessFlag), Q7 (sessionIdentity), Q8 (standardsInjected hash) require p3.2a fields — these merged in PR #86 (2026-04-15) and are now schema-present. Acceptance test record to be completed when Phase 3 T3M1 metric evidence is collected.

stories.name: EA registry Path A surface type resolution in surface adapter resolver

metrics.name: Second squad outer loop — unassisted
metrics.evidence: Target met. Acceptance test completed 2026-04-15: craigfo (independent operator, non-platform-maintainer) ran the full outer loop — discovery → benefit-metric → definition → review → test-plan → DoR with contracts → implementation plans → DoD → verification scripts — for feature 2026-04-15-productise-cli-and-sidecar and a second discovery (2026-04-16-engine-consolidation). Delivered working CLI (TypeScript, ~15 source files, E2E tests). Zero blocking lookups. No platform team assistance. First independent non-operator pipeline run on record. Evidence: PR #98 (heymishy/skills-repo, 2026-04-15).
metrics.targetDescription: Second squad completes full outer loop in one session with zero blocking lookups

metrics.name: Non-git-native surface adapter — passing assurance verdict
metrics.evidence: Adapters for iac, saas-api, saas-gui, m365-admin, and manual are merged and DoD-assessed; resolver Path A/Path B routing is operational.
metrics.targetDescription: At least one non-git-native adapter produces a passing assurance verdict on a real PR

metrics.name: Fleet observability — ≥2 squad states without manual entry
metrics.evidence: p2.7 merged and DoD-complete: fleet registry files, CI aggregation workflow, and viz fleet panel implemented with passing checks.
metrics.targetDescription: fleet-state.json generated by CI with ≥2 squad entries; pipeline-viz renders both

metrics.name: Non-engineer approval interface — DoR sign-off outside VS Code
metrics.targetDescription: At least one real DoR sign-off completed via Jira, Confluence, or Slack/Teams by a genuine non-engineer approver

metrics.name: Solo operator outer loop — Phase 2 calibration
metrics.evidence: Target met. Phase 2 E3 actuals (workspace/phase2-actuals.md, workspace/estimation-norms.md): 13 stories, 2 calendar days, 1h outer loop focus (against 30h E2 estimate), 0 blocking lookups, 25% engagement fraction. All three sub-conditions pass: (1) all outer loop stages completed; (2) calendar span = 2 days ≤ 3-day target; (3) focus h/story = 0.08h — well within ≤2.9h target. Note: outer loop actuals are low-confidence (JSONL unavailable for Phase 2; E3 used fallback). Calibration accuracy measured separately in MM4.
metrics.targetDescription: All outer loop stages complete with ≤1 blocking lookup; calendar span ≤3 days; focus H/story ≤2.9h

metrics.name: Cross-session resume — ISO datetime upgrade
metrics.evidence: Phase 2 E3 run (workspace/phase2-actuals.md, 2026-04-12): all phase duration rows required tier-2/3 fallback — JSONL debug logs were unavailable, forcing manual calendar override. Target was zero tier-2/3 rows. Skills are not consistently writing startedAt/completedAt ISO datetimes to state.json cycle blocks. Mechanism partially operational but target not met.
metrics.targetDescription: All Phase 2 E3 phase duration rows sourced as tier-1 (state.json ISO datetime); zero tier-2/3 fallback

metrics.name: Improvement loop — first proposal reviewed within one feature cycle
metrics.evidence: p2.11 proposal generation and p2.12 challenger/review workflow are both delivered in the same feature cycle.
metrics.targetDescription: At least one proposal with evidence, pre-check, and action taken within Phase 2 delivery cycle

metrics.name: Estimation calibration accuracy
metrics.evidence: Phase 2 E3 measured (workspace/estimation-norms.md, workspace/results.tsv): E2=30h, actual=1h, delta=−29h. Error rate ~2900% — far above <20% target. However actual is low-confidence (JSONL unavailable; E3 used fallback). Two sources of error: (1) E2 estimate was constructed before Phase 2's parallel-execution efficiency was understood; (2) actuals measurement path broken (JSONL logs). Mechanism works — the comparison was performed. Calibration has not converged. Feature 3 (Phase 3) is the next normalisation row.
metrics.targetDescription: |E2−actual|/actual < 20% by feature 3; measured automatically from results.tsv at each /improve E3

metrics.name: Flow findings conversion rate
metrics.evidence: D4 (p2.2), D8/D9/B1-enforce (p2.3) delivered and verified DoD-complete, continuing conversion of logged flow findings into shipped changes.
metrics.targetDescription: ≥50% of logged flow findings result in pipeline improvement within 2 features; operator confirms at each /improve
